topic: ACL main Method Gate 1 opener line-flow polish

visible_issue: page 3 line 178: gates.    Gate 1 screens four assets from
baseline.reader_effect: The Method Evidence Gates opener had a conspicuous sentence-break gap before Gate 1.

change.accepted_summary: Rewrote the Method Evidence Gates opener so Gate 1 starts as a compact clause rather than after a stretched sentence break.
change.before: We organize the evaluation as four evidence gates. Gate 1 screens four assets from Isaac Sim with PSNR, SSIM, LPIPS, CLIP, DINOv2, and headless load/render checks.
change.after: The four evidence gates start with Gate 1, which screens four assets from Isaac Sim with PSNR, SSIM, LPIPS, CLIP, DINOv2, and headless load/render checks.

rejected_candidates.candidate: We organize the evaluation as four evidence gates: Gate 1 screens four assets...
rejected_candidates.reason: The rebuilt PDF split evidence as evi- / dence at the line edge.

accepted_visual_read: page 3 lines 177-180: The four evidence gates start with Gate 1, / which screens four assets from Isaac Sim / with PSNR, SSIM, LPIPS, CLIP, DINOv2, / and headless load/render checks.
after.targeted_scan_result: Page 3 no longer contains evidence gates.    Gate 1 and does not contain the rejected evi- / dence split.

claim_boundary: The accepted edit changes only one Method opener. It does not alter metrics, evidence pools, figures, tables, citations, metadata, or supported/forbidden claim scopes.
residual_risk: The page-5 result.    The official spacing remains unchanged because previous source-level attempts caused worse line breaks.
